reviews.comment:
Cómo socia del Automóvil club siempre he sido bien atendida y ha conseguido espacio para guardar el auto. Viene muy bien tener la cochera allí teniendo el departamento en pleno centro.

(Translated by Google)
As a member of the Automobile Club, I've always received excellent service and have been able to find parking for my car. Having a garage there is very convenient, especially since my apartment is right downtown.
